coachAM: Your "lock in young with a clear" ambition for the University Social Project, coupled with the recurring struggle against "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness," reveals a critical disconnect: you're intellectually aware of the vision but physically and mentally undisciplined in its execution, especially where deep, sustained effort is required. The root cause is a profound lack of self-governance in critical transition zones – morning and evening – which fragments your focus, compromises your physiological foundation, and ultimately erodes the trust you have in yourself to consistently show up as the "best worker, best seller" you envision. Today, before *any* other input, execute your Sovereign Morning protocol, ensuring zero digital distractions touch your awareness until your prayer, reflection, and initial work output are complete.
